work_item_b_status.intent: Audit QOT cross-system bridge between UZG+ qot_nodes (uzgplus-app) and AIER Code qot_lineage (Uniton_OS) across 3 candidate locations
work_item_b_status.status: PASS — verdict reached, audit document published
work_item_b_status.verdict_rationale: Two parallel implementations of the QOT concept in two different Supabase projects. No current connector. The qot_lineage table in Uniton_OS exists but is the BLOCH event log (Lane_03 BRIDGE-02 work), not a UZG+ bridge. The naming overlap is conceptual ('Quantum Object Trail'), not structural.

candidate_findings.candidate_1_uniton_shared_services: services/ directory does not exist; only 15 doc/audit artefact references (no executable bridge code)
candidate_findings.candidate_2_uniton_os: qot_lineage exists (28 hits) but FK is bloch_id -> bloch_pool — BLOCH-internal event log, NOT UZG+ bridge. Comment: 'Created by LANE01-BRIDGE-02 Task 6'. Apps: only 'web'. Edge functions: only 'embed-event', 'embed-message'.
candidate_findings.candidate_3_standalone: 0 hits for qot_bridge_service / qot_sync_service / uzgplus_qot_sync / qot_publisher across 5 repos (search/code rate limit hit at 8/20 probes; remaining redundant). uzgplus-app Edge functions: only reward_emit + wallet_*. Uniton_OS Edge functions: only embed-*. No cron / external worker visible.

schema_comparison.uzg_plus_qot_nodes: tree-shaped, self-FK parent/root, uuid PK, content-node domain (posts/profiles/circles)
schema_comparison.aier_code_qot_lineage: sequence-shaped, FK bloch_id->bloch_pool, bigserial PK, BLOCH event domain (publish/consume/verify/transform/archive)
schema_comparison.structural_overlap: none — different shape, different keys, different actors
schema_comparison.naming_collision_risk: HIGH — both share 'QOT' prefix; readers may wrongly assume they're connected. Recommendation §9 #3 calls for canon disambiguation.
